chapter_title: Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
text:
(a) The board of pilot commissioners for all of the ports and private terminals located in Jefferson or Orange County, or both, is composed of five commissioners from Jefferson or Orange County appointed by the governor in the manner provided by Subchapter A, Chapter 63 (Pilot Boards) .

(b) The presiding officer of the board shall be selected by the members of the board.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.011 — Composition of Board

(a) The board of pilot commissioners for all of the ports and private terminals located in Jefferson or Orange County, or both, is composed of five commissioners from Jefferson or Orange County appointed by the governor in the manner provided by Subchapter A, Chapter 63 (Pilot Boards) .

(b) The presiding officer of the board shall be selected by the members of the board.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The board of pilot commissioners for all of the ports and private terminals located in Jefferson or Orange County, or both, is composed of five commissioners from Jefferson or Orange County appointed by the governor in the manner provided by Subchapter A, Chapter 63 (Pilot Boards) .

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The presiding officer of the board shall be selected by the members of the board.
